Kelpforge is a seed-stage company. Founded by Soren Hartwhistle. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Soren Hartwhistle
type: person
aliases: [soren]
summary: Founder of Kelpforge.
---

Soren Hartwhistle is the founder of Kelpforge. Soren pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

turns.text: Partner meeting wrapped on the Kelpforge round.
We decided to lead the Kelpforge round. Standard terms, clean round. Logging it now.
